priority.title: Fermi's Former CEO Toby Neugebauer Makes More False Claims and Inaccurate Statements
priority.summary: Fermi Inc. (NASDAQ: FRMI) (LSE: FRMI), operating as Fermi America™ ("Fermi" or the "Company"), today announced that it is mailing a letter to shareholders re-emphasizing that all Fermi shareholders should sign, date and return the WHITE Consent Revocation Card today in response to the consent solicitation by former Chief Executive Officer Toby Neugebauer seeking to call a Special Meeting of Shareholders ("Special Meeting"), and sets the record straight on numerous inaccuracie

priority.formExplanation: Proxy-fight material from a non-management participant — solicitation filings made outside the company's own proxy (in a control contest, each side's letters and presentations land here).
priority.summary: Toby Neugebauer and his affiliated entities, collectively known as the Fermi Founder Parties, are soliciting shareholders to designate agents to call a special meeting of Fermi Inc. shareholders, and are providing additional information to street name shareholders on how to vote their shares. The Fermi Founder Parties, who beneficially own approximately 146.5 million shares of Fermi Inc. common stock, are seeking to call a special meeting to allow shareholders to hear proposals and make informed decisions. Shareholders who own shares through a bank, broker, or other nominee are encouraged to check their email and/or mailbox for solicitation materials and vote their GREEN voting instruction f

priority.summary: Toby R. Neugebauer and other participants, including Vicksburg Investments Management LLC and Melissa A. Neugebauer 2020 Trust, have filed a definitive proxy statement to solicit agent designations for calling a special meeting of Fermi Inc. shareholders. Neugebauer beneficially owns 146,516,035 shares of Fermi Inc.'s common stock, while the other participants do not own any shares. The participants are advising all shareholders to read the definitive proxy statement and other proxy materials because they contain important information regarding the special meeting.

priority.title: SEC filing: DFAN14A — Fermi Inc. (SOLICITING MATERIAL PURSUANT TO 240.14A-12A)
priority.formExplanation: Proxy-fight material from a non-management participant — solicitation filings made outside the company's own proxy (in a control contest, each side's letters and presentations land here).
priority.summary: Toby R. Neugebauer, along with other participants, has issued a press release reaffirming his support for John Sellers of Double Eagle as Chairman and CEO of Fermi, citing the need for enhanced accountability and credibility to prevent value destruction by the current Board and management team. Neugebauer claims that the current Board has failed to replace nine key senior executives who departed Fermi after his termination and has ignored proposals from large companies that could offer greater value to shareholders. The release also highlights Neugebauer's intent to continue his campaign to seat a new, strong, independent Board and restore Fermi's position as a pro-shareholder REIT.

priority.summary: Fermi Inc is mailing a Consent Revocation Statement to shareholders in response to a consent solicitation by former CEO Toby Neugebauer, who is seeking to call a Special Meeting of Shareholders. The company's Board of Directors urges shareholders to sign and return the WHITE Consent Revocation Card to protect their investment and support the company's continued execution of its Fermi 2.0 strategy. Neugebauer, who was terminated for cause, currently does not have the required support to call a Special Meeting, and the company emphasizes that it is making progress on its projects, including Project Matador, and is focused on maximizing long-term shareholder value.

priority.title: SEC filing: DFAN14A — Fermi Inc. (SOLICITING MATERIAL PURSUANT TO 240.14A-12A)
priority.formExplanation: Proxy-fight material from a non-management participant — solicitation filings made outside the company's own proxy (in a control contest, each side's letters and presentations land here).
priority.summary: Toby R. Neugebauer, the co-founder and largest shareholder of Fermi Inc., has filed definitive proxy solicitation materials to call a Special Meeting of Shareholders to elect a new Board majority committed to taking all actions to benefit shareholders. Neugebauer is seeking to replace the current Board with six independent directors who have no ties to the Neugebauer family or existing board dynamics, in order to consider a full-value strategic review and potential sale of the company. Shareholders of record as of June 10, 2026, are being asked to sign and return a GREEN agent designation card to support the call for the Special Meeting.

priority.title: SEC filing: PRRN14A — Fermi Inc. (REVISED PRELIMINARY CONSENT STATEMENT)
priority.formExplanation: Revised preliminary proxy material from a non-management participant — a dissident group's updated draft solicitation.
priority.summary: Toby R. Neugebauer, co-founder of Fermi Inc., is soliciting shareholder support to call a special meeting to vote on expanding the board of directors and electing seven new candidates, including himself, and removing three current directors. The proposed changes aim to install a new board majority that would consider a potential sale or strategic partnership of the company, which Neugebauer believes could maximize value for shareholders. Neugebauer's effort is a second attempt to provide shareholders with a vote on the company's future after his initial attempt was obstructed by the company.

priority.summary: /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi Inc. ("Fermi" or the "Company") today announced a series of strategic and leadership initiatives under a new phase of the Company
priority.excerpt: Affirms Ongoing Commitment to Project Matador Buildout, Texas Tech Partnership and Serving America's Energy Needs DALLAS , April 20, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi Inc. ("Fermi" or the "Company") today announced a series of strategic and leadership initiatives under a new phase of the Company's evolution as it continues to progress along its path to becoming a mature, established entity, well positioned for long-term, sustainable growth. Following notable achievements for Project Matador across construction, buildout and regulatory milestones, these developments will position Fermi for its next chapter of innovation, operational excellence, and client-focused service.

priority.title: Fermi America™ Secures $165 Million Equipment Financing Facility from CSG Investments, an Affiliate of Beal Bank USA, to Accelerate Delivery of Six SGT-800 Gas Turbines for 2028 Delivery at Project Matador - PR Newswire
priority.summary: /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi Inc. (d/b/a Fermi America) (NASDAQ & LSE: FRMI), operating as Fermi America™, today announced that it has secured a $165 million senior...
priority.excerpt: AMARILLO, Texas , March 27, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi Inc. (d/b/a Fermi America) (NASDAQ & LSE: FRMI), operating as Fermi America™, today announced that it has secured a $165 million senior secured, first lien delayed draw term loan from CSG Investments, Inc., an affiliate of Beal Bank USA, to finance the remaining progress payments on its previously ordered six Siemens Energy SGT-800-57 gas turbines, with delivery scheduled in 2028. The Borrower of the facility is Fermi Turbine Warehouse II LLC, a wholly owned special purpose entity of Fermi Inc.

priority.title: Fermi America™ Files Second Clean Air Permit Application with TCEQ for 5 GW of Additional Power for Its Project Matador Private Grid - PR Newswire
priority.summary: /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi Inc. (d/b/a Fermi America) (NASDAQ & LSE: FRMI), operating as Fermi America™ today filed an additional 5 GW Clean Air Permit Application...
priority.excerpt: AMARILLO, Texas , March 27, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi Inc. (d/b/a Fermi America) (NASDAQ & LSE: FRMI), operating as Fermi America™ today filed an additional 5 GW Clean Air Permit Application with the Texas Commission on Environmental Quality (TCEQ). The filing, made directly on the heels of Project Matador's first approved 6 GW Clean Air Permit last month reflects Fermi's target of ~17 GW of total power including 11 GW of clean natural gas, combined with nuclear energy, solar and battery sources.

priority.title: World's Largest Private Grid, Fermi America™ to File Additional 5GW Clean Air Permit for Project Matador with the Texas Commission on Environmental Quality (TCEQ) Upsizing Campus Projections to 17GW of Private Power - PR Newswire
priority.summary: /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi Inc. (d/b/a Fermi America) (NASDAQ & LSE: FRMI), operating as Fermi America™, in partnership with the Texas Tech University System (TTU...
priority.excerpt: AMARILLO, Texas , March 13, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi Inc. (d/b/a Fermi America) (NASDAQ & LSE: FRMI), operating as Fermi America™, in partnership with the Texas Tech University System (TTU System), today announced its intention to file an additional 5GW Clean Air Permit with the Texas Commission on Environmental Quality (TCEQ). The announcement made right on the heels of Project Matador's first 6GW Clean Air Permit, approved two weeks ago, signals the campus' plan to achieve ~17GW of total power including 11GW of clean natural gas, 4.4GW of nuclear energy, solar and battery sources.

(NASDAQ: FRMI) regarding the March 6, 2026, lead plaintiff deadline in a pending securities class action against Fermi, certain of Fermi’s top executives and directors, and underwriters of Fermi’s Initial Public Offering (IPO). priority.excerpt: SAN FRANCISCO , Feb. 6, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- National shareholder rights law firm Hagens Berman is issuing an updated notice to investors in Fermi Inc. (NASDAQ: FRMI ) regarding the March 6, 2026, lead plaintiff deadline in a pending securities class action against Fermi, certain of Fermi's top executives and directors, and underwriters of Fermi's Initial Public Offering (IPO). The litigation alleges that Fermi misrepresented the demand for its flagship "Project Matador" —a massive AI data center campus—and the stability of its primary anchor tenant. The complaint alleges that Defendants' misstatements were allegedly revealed on Dec. 12, 2025, when Fermi disclosed that the first tenant for i

priority.title: Fermi America Executes Electric Service Agreement with Southwestern Public Service Company, a Subsidiary of Xcel Energy, Securing Up to 200 MW of Power - PR Newswire
priority.summary: /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi America™ (Nasdaq & LSE: FRMI) today announced a signed, definitive Electric Service Agreement (ESA) with Southwestern Public Service...
priority.excerpt: AMARILLO, Texas , Dec. 5, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi America™ (Nasdaq & LSE: FRMI) today announced a signed, definitive Electric Service Agreement (ESA) with Southwestern Public Service Company (SPS), a subsidiary of Xcel Energy, to provide up to 200 megawatts (MW) of electrical capacity to Fermi's 11 GW Project Matador Campus. "This agreement is yet one more example of Fermi transforming intent into execution, with the strong commercial and technical support of our friends at Xcel Energy," said Larry Kellerman, Chief Power Officer of Fermi America. "Securing reliable and cost-effective power from Xcel Energy today and working together with them to grow our relationship over time is a key co

priority.title: Fermi America and MVM EGI Announce Water-Saving Hybrid Cooling Agreement for World's Largest Private Energy Grid, Delivering on Promises Made to Protect West Texas Water Resources - PR Newswire
priority.summary: Agreement initiates the design and development of hybrid dry–wet cooling towers, leveraging an existing, proven design platform to prioritize air-based cooling...
priority.excerpt: AMARILLO, Texas , Dec. 1, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi America™ (Nasdaq: FRMI ), in partnership with the Texas Tech University System, today announced it has signed a non-binding Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with MVM EGI Zrt., one of the world's leading hybrid dry–wet cooling innovators, to engineer and develop a next-generation cooling system for Fermi's 11-gigawatt private energy grid campus. The agreement marks a major step forward in delivering reliable, clean energy at scale, while being good stewards of the region's natural resources. priority.title: Fermi America™ and the State of Texas Announce Preliminary Approval for First 6 GW of One of the World's Largest Clean Natural Gas Facilities on Project Matador's 11 GW Private HyperGrid™ Campus - PR Newswire
priority.summary: Texas Leading the Way as the Texas Commission on Environmental Quality (TCEQ) Grants Preliminary Approval of Fermi America
priority.excerpt: AMARILLO, Texas , Nov. 4, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi America™ (Nasdaq: FRMI ) in partnership with the Texas Tech University System, announced the Texas Commission on Environmental Quality (TCEQ)'s preliminary approval of 6 GW of clean natural gas-based power generation, of the projected 11 GW campus, which will make Project Matador one of the largest clean natural gas power generation facilities in the world. Understanding that the United States faces an energy arms race for the computing power that defines global leadership in defense, data, and AI, Fermi America is building its Panhandle private grid campus in real time.

priority.title: Fermi America™, City of Amarillo, and Carson County Ink Partnerships to Structure Taxes and Secure First GW of Water to Power Tomorrow's AI - PR Newswire
priority.summary: /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi America™ (Nasdaq: FRMI) today announced a new era of partnership with the City of Amarillo and Carson County, uniting public and private...
priority.excerpt: AMARILLO, Texas , Oct. 29, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi America™ (Nasdaq: FRMI ) today announced a new era of partnership with the City of Amarillo and Carson County, uniting public and private leadership in a shared vision to drive long-term prosperity, economic diversity and job growth for the region, while answering President Trump's call for U.S. energy and AI dominance. In addition, Carson County leadership approved a 10-year tax abatement and reinvestment zone for Fermi America's 11GW private grid campus, creating new tax revenues, securing local investment, spurring economic growth and long-term, sustainable jobs across the region.

priority.title: Fermi America™ Inks Historic Nuclear Deals Ahead of President Trump's Seoul Visit, Securing Lead Position to Initiate AP1000s for America's Nuclear Renaissance - PR Newswire
priority.summary: Companies Unite to Deliver Nuclear Energy on Time and on Budget, Ensuring America
priority.excerpt: AMARILLO, Texas , Oct. 27, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Answering President Trump's call for America to dominate global energy and intelligence, Fermi America inks two historic nuclear deals ahead of the President's Seoul, South Korea visit. Simultaneously, Fermi announced the signing of a Front-End Engineering Design (FEED) contract with Hyundai Engineering & Construction (E&C) to begin engineering work on four AP1000 nuclear reactors for Project Matador, a first-of-its-kind, behind the meter private grid campus under construction in the Texas Panhandle. Marking a major milestone in the partnership between Fermi America and Hyundai E&C, the agreement reflects a shared commitment to delivering nucle

priority.title: Fermi America™ Secures Firm Natural Gas Supply from Energy Transfer to Power Phase One of the HyperGrid™ Campus - PR Newswire
priority.summary: /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi America™, developing the world
priority.excerpt: AMARILLO, Texas , Oct. 9, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi America™, developing the world's largest, behind-the-meter artificial intelligence private grid campus with the Texas Tech University System, has secured an agreement with Energy Transfer, one of the largest and most diversified midstream energy companies in North America, to deliver firm natural gas supply to Fermi's HyperGrid™ campus located outside Amarillo, Texas. With approximately 140,000 miles of pipelines and associated energy infrastructure across 44 states, Energy Transfer is a trusted resource to deliver firm natural gas supplies to Fermi America's 5,236-acre campus.
